gaps.description: All core modules (detector/, engine/, runtime/, server/, cli/, store/, tunnel.js, config.js, index.js, ui/) are implemented matching ARCHITECTURE.md — M101 engine registry unification complete, ARCHITECTURE.md updated to remove stale references (memory.js, ConfigPanel, LocalModels/CloudModels), voice adapter API signatures documented
M103 stability features (GET /api/health, OpenAI error format with code field, audio format validation) are documented in ARCHITECTURE.md as planned but not yet implemented
